focusPoints.label: What they're saying yes and no to lately
focusPoints.reason: What they're prioritizing right now versus day-to-day firefighting, and whether the sequencing still matches team bets.

focusPoints.label: Blockers and dependencies slowing delivery
focusPoints.reason: Where work is getting stuck—decisions, other teams, or technical friction—and what you can unblock quickly.

focusPoints.label: How their updates land with stakeholders
focusPoints.reason: Whether stakeholders feel informed and decisions move forward smoothly based on how Test communicates in writing and meetings.

focusPoints.label: What they'd want more of from you
focusPoints.reason: How they experience your support right now—coaching, air cover, or time—and what would make the next two weeks easier.

transcript.question: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
What's been most on your mind at work lately, Test?
Is now a good time for this conversation, or should we reschedule?
If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?
Is now a good time for this conversation, or would another time work better?
What would make this quarter clearly successful for you — in one sentence?
Is now a good time for this conversation, or would another time work better?
Given what we've covered, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
